headlines.title: Jury throws out Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman in less than two hours
headlines.description: The jury ruled that Elon Musk had waited too long to sue OpenAI and its other co-founders.

headlines.title: Prediction market ‘watchdog’ launches six-figure ad campaign ahead of Senate hearing
headlines.description: A group that says its mission is to serve as a prediction market “watchdog” is launching a six-figure ad buy this week in the Washington, D.C., media market.

headlines.title: Eric Schmidt booed during graduation speech about AI
headlines.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was booed multiple times while discussing artificial intelligence during a commencement speech at the University of Arizona.

headlines.title: Six tech billionaires walked into a federal courthouse. Here’s what happened next.
headlines.description: The three-week OpenAI trial had numerous markings of its subjects’ wealth, from an inflatable Elon Musk doll to fancy butt cushions.

headlines.title: Inside China’s race to dominate humanoid robotics industry
headlines.description: Beijing has put the robotics industry front and center of its national agenda as the tech race with Washington heats up in several key areas, including AI.

headlines.title: AI-generated pro-Spencer Pratt mayoral campaign videos point to a new political reality
headlines.description: Spencer Pratt’s bid for Los Angeles mayor gained viral traction after AI videos, which Pratt said were “fan-made,” circulated across social media.

headlines.title: Musk’s attorney apologizes for his absence at trial during closing arguments
headlines.description: Elon Musk had traveled to China with President Donald Trump even though the judge said he wasn’t excused.

headlines.title: American Doctor Infected With Ebola While Working in Congo
headlines.description: The CDC confirms an American doctor has tested positive for the deadly Ebola virus while working in the Democratic Republic of Congo. This comes as entry into the United States is being restricted for some travelers in response to the outbreak. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Deadly shooting at San Diego Islamic center
headlines.description: Police said two teenage gunmen opened fire at a San Diego Islamic center, killing three people, including a security guard. Authorities said the gunmen later killed themselves. NBC News' Morgan Chesky reports.

headlines.title: Trump Targets Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie in Tuesday Primary
headlines.description: Voters are heading to the polls for primaries across six states, including Kentucky, where the campaign of Rep. Thomas Massie, a repeated Trump critic, is being seen as a crucial test of President Donald Trump’s power on the Republican party. Meanwhile, the Justice Department set up what it calls an “anti-weaponization fund,” using nearly $1.8 billion of taxpayer money to pay Trump allies who say they were unfairly prosecuted by the Biden administration. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and

headlines.title: Chaos consumes Swatch stores over pocket watch collaboration with Audemars Piguet
headlines.description: Swatch shut down over a dozen stores after crowds swarmed some locations trying to buy the company’s new pocket watch collection with Audemars Piguet, that are already listed for thousands on re-sale sites. NBC News’ Marquise Francis reports.

headlines.title: First look at new Trump Mobile smartphone
headlines.description: After a nine-month wait, repeated calls and emails, NBC News finally received the long-delayed Trump Mobile T1 phone - raising new questions about where it’s actually made. NBC News’ Brian Cheung reports.
